news.title: The Retirement Budget Most People Build Is Backward
news.summary: Most retirement budgets start with the wrong question. The instinct is to ask, “What yield do I need so the nest egg covers the bills?” Higher yield shrinks the required capital, so the math seduces you toward 8%, 10%, or 12% strategies.
